parameters.apprise_url_plus: zulip://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.botname_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.organization_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Zulip destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise zulip:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a Zulip Messages API form body and post it to your Zulip organization (no Apprise).
parameters.gateway_body_template: content={* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}&type=stream
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your Zulip organization (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Zulip destinations, direct

base_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Zulip base URL

botname_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Zulip botname

organization_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Zulip organization

token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Zulip token
